texto: Having your evening coffee overA field guide of trails or alpine blossoms& so I need now to ask youWhich of the old journals did you firstOpen to a map of my long wanderingWhen did you first know I'd come back& how did you find yourself here& how did you know this single lanternYou are reading by was the last possibleLight to lead me home?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David St. John que provoca temas ligados a lideranca. Ao questionar “Having your evening coffee overA field guide of trails or alpine blossoms& so I need now to ask y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre lideranca, lantern, light, com foco em luto e light.
